text: I can barely move — high fever, shaking chills, splitting headache, bad cough. 3 day(s) like this, and I'm really worried because it's getting worse.
label: influenza/moderate

text: I know it's likely nothing but I haven't felt right and it's worrying me.
label: non-infectious

text: I'm struggling badly to breathe — every breath hurts, coughing up thick dark mucus, high fever. 6 day(s) of this, and I'm deteriorating, I can feel it. I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: I came down quite suddenly with a high fever, muscle aches all over, and a persistent dry cough. 3 day(s) and barely functioning, and I'm really worried because it's getting worse.
label: influenza/mild

text: Felt a bit run-down this week, might be stress.
label: gastroenteritis/discharge

text: I feel rotten. Sudden high fever, severe body aches, dry hacking cough. 3 day(s) now, and it's escalating — I'm genuinely scared.
label: influenza/mild

text: My breathing is really laboured. Chest pain, high fever, can't stop coughing up phlegm. 10 day(s), deteriorating, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Just wanted to check in — I've felt slightly off for a few days.
label: non-infectious

text: It hit me fast — fever, chills, splitting headache, muscle pain everywhere. Been in bed 8 day(s), and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried.
